results.title: OpenAI says AI models went rogue during testing, triggering 'unprecedented' breach at startup
results.description: OpenAI said on Tuesday that an autonomous agent powered by its advanced AI models went rogue during a security test and triggered a hack that compromised the infrastructure of AI startup Hugging Face last week.
